name: hermes-agentrouter
description: Connect Hermes Desktop and CLI to AgentRouter through Qwen Code ACP with live models and reasoning controls.

interface.shortDescription: AgentRouter models and reasoning controls for Hermes.
interface.longDescription: Detects Hermes Desktop and CLI, securely stores the AgentRouter token, installs Qwen Code ACP, discovers AgentRouter models live, enables model and reasoning selection, and provides validation and uninstall commands.
interface.defaultPrompt: Install, validate, update, or troubleshoot AgentRouter for Hermes.
